delivery.transport: none loaded — nothing qualified and no new news, so there was nothing to deliver

prerequisites.smallOrderFeeTickets: authenticated $2 and $5 unsubmitted Quick Order tickets at 0.59 reproduce exactly (3.28 -> $0.06, 8.23 -> $0.14); envelope floor now 3.28 contracts
prerequisites.freshFullPipelineRun: data/attestation.json — machine-generated by run-attest.js, bound to the sealed forecast hash and the active card; expires; production also requires SHARP_PRODUCTION=1

bankroll.label: ENTERTAINMENT
bankroll.note: money the human is content to lose for entertainment. Not a research stake, not a validated edge, not Kelly.

caps.provenance: chosen by the human as entertainment limits; NOT derived from Kelly, NOT fitted to any result, NOT evidence of edge

humanReviewAlerts.why: potentially new information with a single origin
humanReviewAlerts.text:
🔎 UNVERIFIED FIGHT UPDATE

Santiago Ponzinibbio vs Sam Patterson

Report: Santiago Ponzinibbio has not been the same fighter since suffering a major injury several years ago.
Sources: 1 independent origin
Forecast impact: None

Verify before acting.
For entertainment use.

🔎 UNVERIFIED FIGHT UPDATE

Bogdan Guskov vs Magomed Ankalaev

Report: Bogdan Guskov is taking the fight against Magomed Ankalaev on short notice.
Sources: 1 independent origin
Forecast impact: None

Verify before acting.
For entertainment use.

decisions.reason: the forecast applied zero adjustments: the system holds no view on this fight and merely restates its baseline. A gap to the market here is price movement, not a disagreement worth betting.

the forecast's prior is an OPENING line (LOGICAL_OPEN) but this contract trades at a CURRENT price. Any difference between them is the market's move since the open, not an edge. A live position requires a wall-clock baseline (tier A/C) contemporaneous with the traded price.
